headlines.title: FDA panel recommends updating covid shots to target XFG strain
headlines.description: A Food and Drug Administration advisory panel on Thursday recommended updating this fall’s Covid shots to target the XFG variant, a fast-growing strain nicknamed “stratus.”The recommendation — from the FDA’s Vaccines and Related Biological Products Advisory Committee — is meant to help vaccine makers prepare shots for the fall and winter, when Covid infections typically rise

headlines.title: CVS Caremark will cover Lilly’s weight loss drug Zepbound again after patient backlash
headlines.description: CVS Caremark will resume covering the weight loss drug Zepbound this year after it removed it from its list of covered medications last year, drugmaker Eli Lilly said.

headlines.title: At the Enhanced Games, drugs don’t get athletes banned. They could get them rich.
headlines.description: When Shania Collins was first approached about taking performance-enhancing drugs last year, it made her nervous enough to contact two members of the Drug Enforcement Administration — her parents.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: From Omaha Steaks to hazmat suits: What life was like for contagion patients in quarantine
headlines.description: As more than 40 Americans remain in quarantine for up to six weeks following a hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship, former patients who spent time inside some of the country’s highest-security medical isolation units during previous viral contagions are sharing what it’s like to endure weeks cut off from the outside world.

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: Halle Berry Talks Turning 60: ‘I’m the Best Version of Myself’
headlines.description: Actor and women’s wellness advocate Halle Berry joins TODAY’s Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones and talks about turning 60, looks back on her prolific career and discusses her new partnership with women's health company Nella. Berry opens up about feeling stronger, wiser, more in control, and like the "best version" of herself as she turns 60 this summer, saying “it’s a privilege to age.” Then, she shares how she hopes her partnership with Nella will help women advocate for themselv

headlines.title: How to Beat the ‘Summer Scaries:’ Tips for Kids and Adults
headlines.description: The transition to summer can be stressful for kids and parents alike so author and psychotherapist Niro Feliciano joins TODAY with tips for how to jump into a new routine while beating the “summer scaries.” She breaks down why unstructured time can be overwhelming for kids coming off a busy school year, shares tips for combating stress like being present and mindful in nature, and highlights the importance of allowing kids to have time to get bored.

headlines.title: Hot Yoga Helps Man Shed 200 Pounds (and Launch a New Career)
headlines.description: Eddie Adegeye weighed more than 400 lbs at just 24 years old, but after a push and some inspirational words from his mother, he turned his life around, embarking on a remarkable 200lb weight loss journey. Eddie joins TODAY to share his story and how it all started with heated yoga, talks about turning his passion into a fitness consulting business, and gives advice for people looking to make that change, saying “just start.”

headlines.title: Health Roundup: GLP-1s, 'Sweet Spot' for Sleep, More
headlines.description: Dr. John Torres, NBC News medical contributor joins TODAY with a roundup of the biggest health stories people are talking about from GLP-1s, to sleep health. He breaks down new studies that show GLP-1s may have even more anti-inflammatory benefits other than just weight loss and explains how to find your “sweet spot” in sleep.

headlines.title: Is the Forme Power Bra really worth $179?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.
